recommendations.title: The Hummingbird Project
recommendations.overview: A pair of high-frequency traders go up against their old boss in an effort to make millions in a fiber-optic cable deal.

recommendations.title: Puff: Wonders of the Reef
recommendations.overview: A baby pufferfish travels through a wondrous microworld full of fantastical creatures as he searches for a home on the Great Barrier Reef.

recommendations.title: Trapped
recommendations.overview: A man gets stuck in an empty high rise without food, water or electricity.

recommendations.title: Hotel Mumbai

recommendations.title: Crawl

recommendations.title: Shut In
recommendations.overview: A widowed child psychologist lives in an isolated existence in rural New England. When caught in a deadly winter storm, she must find a way to rescue a young boy before he disappears forever.

recommendations.title: Blood and Bone
recommendations.overview: In Los Angeles, an ex-con takes the underground fighting world by storm in his quest to fulfill a promise to a dead friend.
